stemHtml: An aeroplane is climbing with a constant IAS. What happens to the Mach number and the stall speed?

options.a: Mach number increases, and the stall speed increases because of the increased CLMAX.
options.b: Mach number increases, and the stall speed increases because of the decreased CLMAX.
options.c: Mach number decreases, and the stall speed increases because of the decreased CLMAX.
options.d: Mach number decreases, and the stall speed increases because of the increased CLMAX.
